bit of information. A landing on its edge (p = 0.001) delivers just about 23 bits. The rarer the event, the more you learn when it happens."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entropy"}]," is the expected information content across all possible outcomes:"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"$L2"}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15"]]}],null,"$L16"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}

3:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"This single formula defines the theoretical limit of lossless compression, the minimum average bits needed to encode a message, and — as it turns out — the learning objective for every modern language model."}]

d:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The transformer architecture is just an efficient way to estimate these conditional probabilities. Attention mechanisms allow the model to condition on relevant context, and the feed-forward layers compute the probability distribution."}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"The Bit Complexity of Intelligence"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Here's where it gets interesting. If we measure the cross-entropy of a language model on human text, we're measuring something fundamental: how well the model compresses human knowledge."}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"className":"list-disc pl-6 mb-4","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"GPT-2 (2019): ~3.5 bits per token"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"GPT-3 (2020): ~2.8 bits per token"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"className":"mb-1","children":"GPT-4 (2023): ~2.1 bits per token"}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"Each reduction represents genuine understanding. The model has learned patterns in language, world knowledge, and reasoning capabilities — all captured in the compression metric."}]
12:["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold mb-4 mt-6","children":"Implications for AGI"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"If intelligence is compression, and compression is prediction, then the path to AGI is clear: build models that achieve better cross-entropy on diverse tasks."}]
14:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"But there's a limit. The entropy of English text is estimated at 0.6-1.3 bits per character. Beyond that lies the fundamental unpredictability of human creativity and randomness."}]
15:["$","p",null,{"className":"mb-4 leading-relaxed","children":"The question isn't whether we'll reach AGI. It's whether we can recognize it when cross-entropy stops being a meaningful metric."}]
